title: Hiro's First Day at Animal School
synopsis: Hiro starts his first day at a special school where he meets friendly animal classmates and learns that making friends can be fun and exciting.

pages.text: Hiro was very excited! Today was his first day at a new school. But this wasn't just any school - it was Animal School! Hiro walked through the big doors and saw something amazing.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face standing at the entrance of a school building drawn in chalkboard style on a dark green board with white chalk, showing excitement with his arms slightly raised
illustration.alt: Hiro looking excited at the school entrance

pages.text: In his classroom, there were animal friends everywhere! A fluffy bunny sat at a tiny desk. A cheerful duck was playing with blocks. A friendly bear was reading a picture book.

illustration.description: A classroom scene drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with colored chalk showing Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face looking around at animal classmates including a white bunny, yellow duck, and brown bear at small desks
illustration.alt: Hiro observing his animal classmates in the classroom

pages.text: "Hello, Hiro!" said Mrs. Owl, his teacher. "Would you like to meet your new friends?" Hiro nodded happily. He loved making new friends, especially animal friends!

illustration.description: Mrs. Owl teacher with brown feathers and big glasses drawn in chalkboard style with white and colored chalk on dark green board, standing next to Hiro who has short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face, both smiling warmly
illustration.alt: Mrs. Owl introducing herself to Hiro

pages.text: First, Hiro met Benny the Bunny. "I love to hop!" said Benny. "Want to hop with me?" Hiro giggled and hopped around the classroom with his new bunny friend.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face hopping alongside a white fluffy bunny, both looking joyful, drawn in chalkboard style with white and colored chalk on dark green board with dusty texture
illustration.alt: Hiro hopping with Benny the Bunny

pages.text: Next, he met Daisy the Duck. "Quack, quack! I like to splash in puddles," she said. "But at school, I like to paint pictures!" Daisy showed Hiro her colorful painting of a rainbow.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face looking at a yellow duck's rainbow painting, drawn in chalkboard style with bright colored chalk on dark green board, showing art supplies scattered around
illustration.alt: Hiro admiring Daisy the Duck's rainbow painting

pages.text: Finally, Hiro met Bruno the Bear. "I'm big, but I'm gentle," Bruno said softly. "I love story time!" All the friends sat in a circle as Mrs. Owl read them a wonderful story about friendship.

illustration.description: Circle time scene drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board showing Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sitting with the bunny, duck, and brown bear while Mrs. Owl holds an open book, all drawn with white and colored chalk
illustration.alt: Story time with all the animal friends

pages.text: At the end of the day, Hiro was so happy. "I love Animal School!" he said. "I can't wait to come back tomorrow and play with all my new animal friends!"

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face waving goodbye to his animal friends at the school door, all drawn in warm chalkboard style with colored chalk on dark green board, showing happiness and friendship
illustration.alt: Hiro saying goodbye to his animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: chalkboard style, chalk drawings, dark green board, white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board

questions.question: What kind of school does Hiro go to?
questions.explanation: Hiro goes to Animal School where he meets animal friends like Benny the Bunny, Daisy the Duck, and Bruno the Bear.

questions.question: Who is Hiro's teacher?
questions.explanation: Mrs. Owl is Hiro's teacher who introduces him to his new animal friends and reads stories to the class.

questions.question: What does Benny the Bunny love to do?
questions.explanation: Benny the Bunny loves to hop, and he invites Hiro to hop around the classroom with him.

questions.question: How does Hiro feel at the end of the day?
questions.explanation: Hiro feels very happy at the end of the day and can't wait to come back to school to play with his new animal friends.
